name: leanforge
description: Intent-to-implementation: from a goal, design docs, notes, or a mix, elicit and validate intent into a grounded 3-doc, then orchestrate dependency-aware parallel execution with right-sized review.

interface.shortDescription: Turn any input into a grounded 3-doc, then execute it.
interface.longDescription: Leanforge turns any input — a goal, design docs, or notes — into a grounded 3-doc, then helps Codex execute it with dependency-aware waves, git isolation where needed, and right-sized verification.
defaultPrompt: Use /leanforge:prime to turn this goal, doc, or notes into a 3-doc.
